title: selaginella sepikensis
intro: Selaginella sepikensis is a species of plant in the Selaginella genus, commonly known as a resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself from a dry, desiccated state by regaining its green color and resuming photosynthesis when water becomes available. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Selaginella sepikensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially acting as an antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of Selaginella sepikensis are typically made by drying and powdering the plant, which can then be used in tea, capsules, or other supplements.
